greeting: I can help you craft custom column expressions for your HCM reports. Tell me what data you want to calculate, compare, or transform, and I'll guide you through building the perfect formula.

suggestedPrompts.title: Calculate Annual Salary
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I need to calculate 'Annual Salary' for hourly employees. I have 'Hourly Pay' and 'Pay Type' columns. For employees where 'Pay Type' is 'Hourly', calculate their annual salary assuming 40 hours per week and 52 weeks per year.

suggestedPrompts.title: Calculate Years Employed
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I need to calculate how many years each employee has been with the company. I have 'Days Employed' as a numeric column. Convert it to years and round to one decimal place.

suggestedPrompts.title: Check Credential Status
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I want a column that shows whether an employee's credentials are expired, expiring soon, or current. I have 'Credential Expires' as a date column. If it's past today, show 'Expired'. If within 90 days, show 'Expiring Soon'. Otherwise show 'Current'.

suggestedPrompts.title: Calculate Benefit Cost
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I want to calculate total monthly benefit cost per employee. I have 'Scheduled EE Amount' and 'Scheduled ER Amount' columns. Add them together for a 'Total Benefit Cost' column.

suggestedPrompts.title: Format Phone Number
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I have a 'Work Phone' column with values like '555-0101'. If the field is empty, display 'N/A'. Otherwise, keep the existing format.

suggestedPrompts.title: Identify Training Needs
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Create a column based on 'Training Profile'. If the value is 'New Hire', show 'Onboarding Required'. If it contains 'LOTO Authorized', show 'Safety Certified'. Otherwise show 'Standard'.
